query: Could you create a travel itinerary for a group of 4 departing from Honolulu to Los Angeles for 3 days, from March 26th to March 28th, 2022? We are on a new budget of $6,200. Keep in mind that our accommodations must allow children under 10 and we need entire rooms to accommodate all of us. Please note that we won't be self-driving for transportation.
